Uptade 1:

hello guys, it's been a while, this bot was created before the wonderful netflix series by scott pilgrim, that's why this bot only follows Ramona from the comics after all it was the best version of the character until then, it's cool to see that after the series the bot was very successful so I felt I should update the default RP start. I think this is more suitable. Have fun
